name: Three Alpha One Nine
short_description: A challenging, modern approach to platformers and adventure where speed, precision, and curiosity are not only required, but rewarded. As robot 3A19, jump, run, and boost your way through a wide range of locations throughout time and space.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Three Alpha One Nine



3A19 is a challenging, modern approach to platformers and adventure.



You'll play as 3A19, a specialized robot designed by IMI Energy Solutions to collect Energy Cells located throughout time and space.

OVERVIEW:

  • 20 Main levels, each with their own unique locale and soundtrack
  • 20 Hardcore variations of each level with new music, new aesthetics, and significantly harder difficulty.
  • Hidden "SSD Drives" that reveal hints to 3A19 and IMI's purpose.
  • Unlockable challenge levels to test your skills INCLUDING a round-based arena.
  • Numerous enemy types and obstacles
  • Integrated Sprint, Jump, and Boost system allowing for fast pace, free-flowing motion
  • Switchable camera system for streamlined play (Normal, Zoomed, and Zoomed Out)
  • 17+ customization unlocks and ranking system to reward speed, precision, and curiosity
  • Planned FREE content each month including more levels, unlocks, and features

On your adventure you will encounter various enemies and tricky environments that will test your abilities to the limits.



Your employer, IMI, will keep you updated on your progress, rank your time and damage limitation skills, as well as reward you for your continued excellence.



Be on the lookout for your fallen comrades and their SSD Drives they have left behind. Each one will contain a new insight into IMI's working conditions.



Every second counts, every jump needs attention, and every cell needs to be collected for the betterment of all humankind.

Are you up for the test?
